title: Stage 4 overview: base view plus overlay API
description: Add render(model,{baseView,overlays}) path so overview base view and auth/dataflow/boundary/permission/validation overlays combine without reparsing.
triage_notes: Stage 4 started. render(model,{baseView,overlays}) now coexists with legacy render(model,{view}); baseView selects the registered base renderer; overlays are validated without reparsing, stamped onto the SVG root as data-overlays and archmap-overlay-* classes, and unknown names emit non-blocking unknown_overlay diagnostics. Remaining: implement actual overlay projection composition for auth/dataflow/boundary/permission/validation on overview base, then acceptance checks for overlay combinations and legibility.
